raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"game_storage_requirement","confidence":0.98,"matched_text":"God of War (2018) requires around 45 GB of free space, and Horizon Zero Dawn requires around 47 GB.","distilled_fact":"God of War (2018) requires around 45 GB of free space."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"game_storage_requirement","confidence":0.98,"matched_text":"God of War (2018) requires around 45 GB of free space, and Horizon Zero Dawn requires around 47 GB.","distilled_fact":"Horizon Zero Dawn requires around 47 GB of free space."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"console_storage_capacity","confidence":0.95,"matched_text":"The default storage capacity of the PS5 is 825 GB","distilled_fact":"The default storage capacity of the PS5 is 825 GB."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"storage_space_estimate","confidence":0.91,"matched_text":"So, if you plan to download both games, you'll need around 92 GB of free space.","distilled_fact":"Downloading both God of War (2018) and Horizon Zero Dawn requires around 92 GB of free space."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"console_feature","confidence":0.9,"matched_text":"The PS5 supports external SSDs, which can greatly expand your storage capacity and improve loading times.","distilled_fact":"The PS5 supports external SSDs."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"storage_benefit","confidence":0.82,"matched_text":"The PS5 supports external SSDs, which can greatly expand your storage capacity and improve loading times.","distilled_fact":"External SSDs can greatly expand storage capacity and improve loading times on the PS5."}]}
